I'll start by reading the file to understand its current content.

Now let me reason through both fixes:

**Fix 1:** `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`
- Line 4: Replace `TextVariants` import with `ContentVariants`
- Lines 10, 15, 20: Replace `TextVariants.p` with `ContentVariants.p` (member mapping confirms `p -> p`)

**Fix 2:** `Text` → `Content`
- Line 4: Replace `Text` import with `Content`
- Lines 10, 15, 20: Replace `<Text` with `<Content` and `</Text>` with `</Content>` (though looking at the file, the `Text` tags are self-closing with children, so it's `<Text ...>` and `</Text>`)
- Props `className` and `component` both map directly to `Content`

Both fixes affect the import on line 4 and the JSX usage. The combined result:
- Import becomes: `import { Content, ContentVariants } from '@patternfly/react-core';`
- All `<Text` becomes `<Content`, all `</Text>` becomes `</Content>`
- All `TextVariants.p` becomes `ContentVariants.p`

arguments.after:
<Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Field selectors let you select Nodes based on the value of one or more resource fields.',
        )}
      </Content>
      <Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Note that for Node field expressions, entering a full path is required in the "Key" field (e.g. "metadata.name: value").',
        )}
      </Content>
      <Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t('Some fields may not be supported.')}
      </Content>

        {t(

      </Text>
      <Text className="text-muted" component={TextVariants.p}>
        {t('Some fields may not be supported.')}
      </Text>

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1 (TextVariants → ContentVariants):** Applied. Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in the import (line 4) and all three JSX usages (`TextVariants.p` → `ContentVariants.p` on lines 10, 15, 20).

2. **Fix 2 (Text → Content):** Applied. Replaced `Text` with `Content` in the import (line 4) and all three JSX element pairs (`<Text` → `<Content`, `</Text>` → `</Content>` on lines 10/14, 15/19, 20/22). All props (`className`, `component`, `children`) mapped directly with no changes needed.
